name: Pamela's PRO Workout
description: Compact programmable clock-synced modulation source with 8 independent outputs. Each output freely configurable as LFO, trigger, envelope, Euclidean pattern, or random. BPM 10–330, with CV inputs and cross-output modulation.

controls.name: Program Knob
controls.description: Push-turn encoder for all UI navigation. Twist to scroll outputs/values, push to select, push+hold to access extended parameters.
controls.detail: Push: select · Twist: adjust · Hold (>1s): extended params

controls.name: Start / Stop Button
controls.description: Starts and stops the master clock. Pressing stop also resets clock position.

inputs.name: CLK
inputs.description: External clock input. Overrides internal BPM when patched. Rising edge 700mV min.

inputs.name: RUN
inputs.description: Run/stop input. High voltage starts clock, low stops it. Can also act as CV 3 or Reset.

inputs.name: CV 1
inputs.description: Assignable CV input 1. Assignable to any output parameter with individual attenuation and offset.

inputs.name: CV 2
inputs.description: Assignable CV input 2. Assignable to any output parameter with individual attenuation and offset.

outputs.name: OUT 1–8
outputs.description: Eight independent clocked CV/gate outputs with LED indicators. Each fully programmable with shape, divisor/multiplier, Euclidean, probability, and cross-modulation.

behaviors.name: Per-Output Clock Division / Multiplication
behaviors.description: Each output has an independent multiplier or divisor from /16384 to ×192 including non-integer triplet and dotted values. Utility modes: GATE (held high), OFF, START pulse, STOP pulse.

behaviors.name: Waveform Shapes
behaviors.description: Each output selects from: Gate/Pulse, Ratchet ×2/×4, Triangle, Trapezoid, Sine, Hump, Exp/Log Envelope, Classic Random (S&H), Smooth Random. Width/Slew parameter shapes each waveform.

behaviors.name: Euclidean Patterns
behaviors.description: Generate Euclidean rhythms per output. Set Steps (total), Triggers (hits), Pad (empty suffix steps), and Shift (rotation). Pattern loops can reset non-4/4 patterns.

behaviors.name: Probability & Loops
behaviors.description: Probability sets % chance each step fires. Loop specifies reset point in beats. Loop Nap/Wake creates sleeping patterns (output off for N loops, active for M loops).

behaviors.name: Cross Operations
behaviors.description: Any output can be influenced by another output or CV input via operations: MIX, MULT, ADD, SUB, MIN, MAX, HOLD, S&H, MASK, NOT, OR, XOR, AND, BitOR, BitXOR, BitAND, SEED, and FLEX ops (HUMAN, SWING, RAMP UP/DOWN, HUMP, DELAY, PWR2).

behaviors.name: Quantiser
behaviors.description: Quantises output to musical scales. Custom scales saveable. Applied after cross operations.

patchIdeas.name: Polyrhythmic drum triggers
patchIdeas.patch: OUT 1–4 set to Gate/Pulse · different divisors (x1, /2, /3, /4) → drum voices

patchIdeas.name: Random melodic CV
patchIdeas.patch: OUT 5 = Smooth Random · Euclidean Steps on OUT 6 as gate · OUT 5 → Quantiser → VCO V/Oct

patchIdeas.name: Swung clock with FLEX
patchIdeas.patch: OUT 1 = x1 gate · FLEX op = SWING → OUT 2 · vary swing amount via CV 1
